prompt:
Create a premium sports poster in the style of a Nike × FIFA World Cup editorial campaign. Feature one legendary football player as the hero with a dynamic full-body action pose layered in front of a massive grayscale close-up portrait. Apply a bold horizontal color strip across the eyes using the national flag colors while the rest of the portrait remains monochrome. Place a huge hand-painted jersey number on the right with textured brush strokes.

Use a clean white concrete background with subtle stadium architecture, smoke, dust, paint splashes, ink textures, halftone patterns, distressed paper, and grunge overlays. Add a vertical outlined surname on the left edge, small uppercase first name, handwritten signature near the bottom, national team crest, minimalist typography, inspirational slogan, and modern editorial layout.

Color palette should match the player's national team (Portugal: red & green, Argentina: sky blue & white, France: blue, white & red, Brazil: yellow, green & blue). Use dramatic rim lighting, high contrast, realistic skin texture, sharp jersey fabric details, cinematic shadows, premium magazine cover composition, dynamic depth, layered collage design, sports branding aesthetic, ultra-realistic, 8K, HDR, award-winning graphic design.

Style keywords:
editorial sports poster, FIFA World Cup, Nike campaign, double exposure, layered collage, monochrome portrait, selective color, grunge textures, paint splashes, brush typography, stadium atmosphere, premium branding, modern sports graphic design, photorealistic, ultra detailed.
